title: Print Job Model
text: Print Job Model Name of the print job model to use. The default name is PRINTER. To select, create, or update another print job model, click >> . Related Links Print Job Models A print job model is a named collection of printer attributes that determine how and where Uniface forms or reports are printed, including details of the device type, margins, and so on. A print job model must be available before you can print. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
